name: airlock
description: Layered prompt-injection / agent-security guard for Claude Code — ingress (invisible-Unicode + heuristics + Prompt Guard 2), egress exfiltration gate, task-drift, MCP supply-chain vetting, and memory-write poisoning defense.

plugins.name: airlock
plugins.description: Defends an agent at every trust boundary: scans WebFetch/WebSearch content for prompt injection (incl. invisible-Unicode ASCII smuggling), gates outbound exfiltration of secrets/PII and Markdown-URL sinks (EchoLeak), checks task drift before sensitive actions, vets installed MCP servers for tool poisoning, and blocks poisoned memory writes.
